payload.title: Zero-config cross-crate signature index from cargo's dep graph
payload.description: R0042/named-arg enforcement across crates currently needs manual `trust index` + TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH. Auto-discover/build the signature index from cargo's resolved dependency graph during `cargo trustc build`, so cross-crate named-arg checking 'just works'. Long-standing gap (RT-66) and the other half of RT-105's remaining depth — removes the last manual step in a multi-crate dialect adoption.
